name: TurboScribe Full Convertible Strategy Library
scope: All TurboScribe transcript methods that have enough structure to become a strategy, detector, filter, risk module, or separate bot family.
source_policy: Derived from TurboScribe-named archives/docs scanned under /home/rfing and the deduped document inventory in analysis/turboscribe.
safety_policy: No method is considered live-money ready until it has deterministic detectors, replay/backtest receipts, paper-trading receipts, OCO protection, exposure limits, and a daily loss breaker.
current_runtime_note: ODA_TRABOT is OANDA practice-only. Some methods below are OANDA-compatible, while options/stocks/futures/crypto methods are convertible only for separate bot families.

source_titles: The Best Top Down Analysis Strategy for 2025 Forex Trading Guide
This Trading Strategy is Boring, but Made Me My First $100,000
I Just Made $120,000 in 48h With This Forex Trade
strategy_families.core_edge: Trade only in the direction of weekly/daily/4H structure, then use lower timeframes for entries.
convertible_rules: Compute weekly, daily, and 4H directional bias.
Use 2H/1H/30M/15M for pullback alignment and trigger timing.

source_titles: Moving Average Trading Tutorial (For Day Trading)

source_titles: My Simple 5 Minute Scalping Strategy (Rules Based)
strategy_families.core_edge: Use first 15-minute candle direction as session bias, then trade retest/continuation on 5-minute execution.
convertible_rules: Read first 15M candle of the target session.
Trade only in that bias until invalidated.
Require retest and strong price action.

source_titles: How to use Claude To Gain a Huge Day Trading Edge
strategy_families.core_edge: Program very specific alert conditions instead of broad price-cross alerts.
convertible_rules: Alert only when break, retest, volume/momentum, and time conditions align.
Use alert logic as candidate generation, not direct execution.

source_titles: How I Avoid False Breakouts (My Secret Technique)
strategy_families.core_edge: Avoid breakout entries when post-break behavior is weak, lethargic, or immediately rejected.
convertible_rules: Track repeated touches of the level.
Use the first bars after the break as acceptance/rejection evidence.
Block entry when the break returns inside the level.

source_titles: Most Effective RANGE Trading Strategy for Crypto Forex & Stocks (SidewaysChoppy Market Strategy)
strategy_families.core_edge: Wide ranges are bounce environments; narrow ranges are breakout-prep environments.
convertible_rules: Classify trend, wide range, or narrow range before entry.
Wide range: buy support rejection or sell resistance rejection.
Narrow range: wait for breakout and acceptance.
De-rank blind MACD-style signals in chop.
